sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The player moved LEFT! Looking at the image, the player is now further left in the horizontal corridor. The player was at the right side of the horizontal corridor and moved left.
Now let me continue exploring. The corridor seems to go:
- LEFT from current position (towards the left end of the horizontal corridor)
- Then there might be a corner where I can go DOWN
- Then RIGHT to reach the bottom grid
Let me try to navigate the full corridor path. First, let me find the player's current position and the corridor layout.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Find player and corridor layout
seg = current_frame.segmentation
player = None
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'Y':
        b = n['boundary']
        r = sum(p[0] for p in b)//len(b)
        c = sum(p[1] for p in b)//len(b)
        player = (r, c)
        print(f"Player at ({r}, {c})")
        break

# Find black corridor cells
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
# Print rows around the corridor
for row in [32, 33, 34, 35, 36, 37, 38]:
    print(f"{row}: {ascii_lines[row][20:55]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
